payload.answer: The new fact updates the project state of the Brain Slack agent from planned/open to implemented. This is a status transition rather than a direct contradiction.
citations: Existing project state: The Brain Slack agent is planned, status=open.
New: The Brain Slack agent MVP is now implemented.

entity_resolution.reason: Both facts refer to the Brain Slack agent and appear to describe the same project over time.
